visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged Asian man with glasses and a blue denim flat cap appears in a medium close-up, standing in a brightly lit indoor room with a plain white wall behind him. He wears a light green sweatshirt with 'ATHLETICS' text and speaks enthusiastically while holding a clear-cased iPhone. (2) The camera transitions to an extreme close-up of the iPhone screen, held by hands with clean nails. The screen displays a lock-screen photo of the same man; the hands interact with the interface, sliding through wallpaper options in the iOS customization menu. (3) The viewpoint switches to a screen capture style showing the photo gallery where a picture of a man in a blue hoodie and cap is selected. The background of the photo shows a modern glass building interior with a colorful '25' floor graphic. (4) A finger presses a specific 'Depth Effect' icon at the bottom of the screen, triggering a 'Generating Spatial Scene' loading overlay. The phone is then tilted physically to demonstrate the 3D parallax effect where the subject moves independently of the background. (5) The man returns to the frame briefly to conclude the tutorial, followed by a final close-up of the finished 3D lock screen wallpaper with clock and battery widgets added at the bottom.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Subtitle]: 教大家怎麼快速做出3D桌布. (2) [Subtitle]: 你看會動耶. (3) [Subtitle]: 好 我們現在呢 一樣到桌布這裡呢 你就往旁邊滑新增. (4) [Subtitle]: 新增一個照片. (5) [Subtitle]: 選擇照片以後你就選擇 假設你想要選擇這一張好了. (6) [Subtitle]: 好你就選擇它. (7) [Subtitle]: 選擇完以後呢 照片是不是放進來對不對. (8) [Subtitle]: 放進來以後呢 你可以把照片先縮小. (9) [Subtitle]: 你們看它其實已經在調整對不對. (10) [Subtitle]: 好這邊 這個鈕把它按下去. (11) [Subtitle]: 誒嘿嘿 你們看一件事情哦. (12) [Subtitle]: 你看 有沒有看到 它就變成3D的了. (13) [Subtitle]: 是不是3D的了. (14) [Subtitle]: 是不是很方便 而且這個時間呢 你也可以自己去拉. (15) [Subtitle]: 然後呢 我們這個小工具 一樣在下面 你可以加入小工具. (16) [Subtitle]: 好加入這個電池時間OK. (17) [Subtitle]: 好 這樣子 你的客製化的桌布就完成啦. (18) [Subtitle]: 這樣子是不是很簡單. (19) [Subtitle]: Save.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the tutorial and appearing in the wallpaper photos.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male wearing a blue denim newsboy cap, round-framed glasses, and a light green sweatshirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primary background is a plain white wall with natural light from a nearby window. Secondary backgrounds within the phone photos include a modern glass-walled office or exhibition space with colorful floor graphics.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a male voice speaking in a high-arousal, energetic tone at a fast speech rate. A bright, upbeat acoustic guitar BGM with a steady 4/4 drum beat accompanies the speech, maintaining a positive major-key atmosphere. (2) A distinctive digital 'pop' or bubble sound effect triggers as the narrator highlights a visual transition to the phone screen. The vocal delivery remains crisp with clear articulation, following a professional instructional style. (3) Soft digital UI clicking sounds are audible each time the screen is touched during the photo selection process. The BGM remains continuous and level, acting as a rhythmic bed under the dominant vocal narration. (4) A low-frequency digital chime or confirmation SFX triggers when the '3D' effect is activated. The narrator's voice exhibits a slightly rising intonation, expressing excitement and accomplishment as the tutorial reaches its conclusion.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide a quick, accessible tutorial for iPhone users on how to utilize the iOS depth-effect feature to create visually engaging 3D-style wallpapers. It leverages a personal brand and high-energy delivery to capture attention on social media.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A classic tech-vlogger style short-form video using screen recording and direct-to-camera address to deliver high-density information quickly.
